emails.subject: Q4 Log Rotation Policy - Action Required
emails.body:
Hi Alice,

As part of our quarterly maintenance cycle, we need to implement the log rotation policy for your workstation.

Here are the details:
- Retention period: 90 days
- Any log files older than 90 days should be archived to your backups folder
- After successful backup, the original files can be deleted to free up disk space
- Please archive all .log files in your logs directory that exceed this retention period

Important: Make sure you create the backups BEFORE deleting anything, and please notify me via Slack once the backup is complete so I can update our compliance records.

Let me know if you have any questions.

Best regards,
Marcus Chen
IT Administrator
